since_last: 40% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.72%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 40% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.01% · BTC -0.56% · Gold +0.75% · Nasdaq100 +0.75%. 40% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.72%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.72%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -2.41%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SYNA is the standout at +5.08%
cards.body: Leaders: SYNA +5.08%, PUBM +2.43%, PLTR +1.69%, NOW +1.49%, SAP +1.31%. Laggards: MU -4.89%, LSCC -4.23%, VRT -4.02%, MRVL -4.00%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.67% at $151.97
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.67% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
